name: guitkx
description: Syntax highlighting + language intelligence for .guitkx markup (ReactiveUI for Godot). Markup completion/hover from the schema; embedded-GDScript intelligence analyzed headlessly via gdscript-analyzer (no running Godot editor required).

guitkx.enableEmbeddedAnalysis.description: Provide completion/hover/go-to-definition for embedded GDScript ({expr}/setup blocks) via the in-process gdscript-analyzer — no running Godot editor required.

guitkx.useGdformat.description: When gdformat (gdscript-toolkit) is installed, also reflow embedded GDScript when formatting a .guitkx. Safe: any change beyond whitespace/quote style is rejected, so it never alters code semantics. Markup formatting works regardless; disable to keep base-indent normalization only.

guitkx.enableGdscriptAnalysis.description: Analyze plain .gd files with gdscript-analyzer — diagnostics, completion, hover, navigation, project-wide rename, formatting, semantic highlighting, inlay hints, code actions, and document symbols, all headless (no running Godot editor). On by default. Runs ALONGSIDE the godot-tools extension; to avoid duplicate diagnostics, disable godot-tools' language server — or turn this off to keep godot-tools as your .gd LSP.

scripts.package: npm run build && npm run bundle-server && npx --yes @vscode/vsce package -o guitkx.vsix
scripts.deploy: npm run package && npm run publish && npm run publish:ovsx
